TestCase z5Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.na * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.na * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to sort
    if (follow_case.na == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Sort array 'a' in descending order
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.na - 1; ++i) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.na; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.a[i] < follow_case.a[j]) {
                int temp = follow_case.a[i];
                follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[j];
                follow_case.a[j] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
